marshallese.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Conversion factor = ratio ej joñan 1 (waanjoñak, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Ñe kwōj koorḷọk kōn e ej ukōt unit eo im jab ukōt value eo. SI prefixes (kilo, milli) rej powers of 10 — kōṃṃakūt wōt decimal eo.
marshallese.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Aetok, mass, volume, temperature, iien, energy, pressure. Rule eo make eḷap tokjān: loore units ilo kajjojo step. Ñe answer eo aṃ āliktata ej ilo m² ke kwaar kōṇaan seconds, ewōr juon error ijoko ilōñ.
marshallese.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Conversions in mour raan otemjej (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) im AP / SAT / lab measurements. Kajjojo kajjitōk ej kwaḷọk conversion factor ālikin aṃ uwaak, bwe kwōn kalōk muscle memory.
marshallese.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Real-world unit-conversion scenarios: gas mileage, recipe scaling, dosage calculations, travel-distance estimates. Word problems rej 80% reading comprehension + 20% conversion math.
marshallese.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: Kajjojo SI prefix ej juon power of 10. Slide source im target exponents ñan eñjake ewi joñan an scales ettoḷọk jān doon — skill eo eḷap ālikin scientific notation im Fermi estimates.
marshallese.test_your_unit_conversion_knowledge: Māllejoñ jeḷā eo aṃ kōn unit conversion!
marshallese.question: 🧠 Kajjitōk
marshallese.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Kalpin Generate ñan juon word problem AI ej kōṃṃane
marshallese.2_orders_of_magnitude_close_cousins_cm: <2 orders of magnitude — ro nukun epaak (cm→m).
marshallese.5_8_oom_biology_to_geology_scales: 5-8 OOM — scales in biology ñan geology.
marshallese.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Ukōt source im target exponents (10^N). Widget ej kōjenolọk magnitude change ñan 5 bands rejenolọk. Ejjeḷọk score, ejjeḷọk reveal.
marshallese.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Hypothesis: Real-world examples rōt rej tōpar kajjojo magnitude band?
marshallese.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Kwōj jaḷ — kwaḷọk prompts ko rōpeḷḷọk
marshallese.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Keidi cm→km, mm→light-year. Jete OOM kajjojo?
marshallese.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Etke rej katakin scientists ilo orders of magnitude?
marshallese.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ij meḷeḷe — kōmḷeḷeik ilo naan ko aṃ
marshallese.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Kōmḷeḷeik etke dimensional reasoning ilo elōñ OOM epen.
marshallese.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Design note: discrete 5-state magnitude marker; ejjeḷọk error score; ejjeḷọk reveal — by design.
marshallese.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Metric Prefixes — Powers of 10 jān atoms ñan galaxies
